seoTitle: Wentworth vs Wentworth Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wentworth and Wentworth Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wentworth vs Wentworth Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wentworth and Wentworth Point.
heading: Wentworth vs Wentworth Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wentworth, New South Wales and Wentworth Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wentworth has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Wentworth Point (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wentworth or Wentworth Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wentworth has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Wentworth Point scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wentworth scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Wentworth Point scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wentworth or Wentworth Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wentworth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
